title: CutoverContractArtifact
description: Planning contract for the single authoritative machine-readable artifact that defines cutover compatibility gating for the mission/build terminology release.

release_version.description: spec-kitty-events release that ships this cutover policy.

signal_field_name.description: Exact on-wire field name that live consumers must read for compatibility gating.

signal_location.description: Where the compatibility signal appears on wire. Downstream repos must not invent alternate locations.

cutover_contract_version.description: Required machine-checkable compatibility signal that live consumers must enforce.

accepted_major.description: Major version that live consumers must accept for this cutover.

forbidden_legacy_keys.description: Legacy public keys whose presence classifies a payload as pre-cutover.

forbidden_legacy_event_names.description: Legacy event names forbidden on live ingestion paths for this release.

forbidden_legacy_aggregate_names.description: Legacy aggregate names forbidden on live ingestion paths for this release.

forbidden_legacy_contract_surfaces.description: Optional extra forbidden surfaces beyond keys and event names.
